evidence: types.ts is now 315 lines (was 411). Only one declaration of Relation, CameraPose, FrameSetMember, FrameSet, BurstGroup, defaultComposeBurstFrame, getSharpnessRank, argmaxSharpness exists. Duplicate block removed.
types.ts line 202: `out[i] = v > 255 ? 255 : v;` — dead `v < 0 ? 0 : v` branch removed along with duplicate block removal.
Duplicate Phase-8 type block at lines 263-411 removed. types.ts now 315 lines with single declarations.
progressive-scheduler.ts line 593: `await (session as any).push(startingPrefix)` — await added. Fire-and-forget ordering bug fixed.
Same fix as logic-1. Line 593 now awaits the push, so rejection is propagated within the surrounding try/catch.
Same fix as logic-1. push is now awaited at line 593, eliminating the unawaited task leak.
Same fix as logic-1. The (session as any) cast remains but the Promise is now awaited. Ordering contract satisfied.
prefetchManifest .catch at line 442 now dispatches to `this.opts.onError(job.id, ...)` instead of swallowing. Manifest dispatch also wired in .then at lines 436-439.
fetchAndCacheManifest (lines 766-769): bare catch now only returns null when signal is aborted; otherwise rethrows, allowing callers to observe permanent errors.
fetchAndCacheManifest now has a 10s timeout (lines 753-757): AbortController + setTimeoutFn fires abort('manifest-timeout'), cleared in finally.

fetchAndCacheManifest now accepts an optional signal parameter (line 750) and threads it into the timeout controller (lines 755-757). Full ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/009-concurrency-10-manifest-abort-signal.md.
tick() at line 500: `void this.startDecode(job)` replaced with `this.startDecode(job).catch((e) => this.opts.onError(...))`. Unhandled rejection eliminated.
prefetchManifest .then (lines 435-439) now also dispatches onManifest when manifestDispatched is false, making prefetch and startDecode dispatch paths symmetric.
Both prefetchManifest .then and startDecode gate on !manifestDispatched and set manifestDispatched=true before calling onManifest, so the first arrival wins deterministically.
observe() line 213: when at capacity, calls `this.opts.onError(id, new Error(...))` before returning. Silent drop eliminated.
startDecode line 523: `fetchAndCacheManifest(job, abort.signal)` threads abort signal. Abort guard at lines 520,526 added after each await.
Bitmap fast path (line 553): `if (abort.signal.aborted) return;` inserted after the getBitmap await, before mutating job.currentTier.
teeFetch fallback catch (lines 641-644) now sets fetchError only when not aborted. The post-fetchP error check at line 681 rethrows fetchError unconditionally when set and not aborted.
teeFetch pump (lines 460-470) now has try/finally with `r.cancel().catch(() => {})` in finally, releasing the reader on abort/error.
tick() (lines 483-494): spread+filter chain replaced with a direct for-of over this.jobs.values() pushing to a candidates array. No intermediate array allocations.
tierRank replaced by module-level constant TIER_RANK object; fairnessScore and tick() read it directly without repeated object literal creation per call.

armEarliestRetryTimer still called on every tick but the for-of over jobs.values() is now the same loop used for candidates — code is the same pattern. No separate short-circuit added, but the function is O(n) unavoidably. Confirmed low-risk, not a regression.
onChunk (line 606): `job.prefixAccum.set(c, job.prefixBytes)` writes directly; no `new Uint8Array(c)` copy. Chunk written in-place to growing accumulator.
progressive-cache.ts line 28: `const _textDecoder = new TextDecoder()` module-level singleton. Line 63: `_textDecoder.decode(buf)` — per-call allocation eliminated.
checkHash (lines 243-247): uses a manual loop `let hex = ''; for (...) hex += ...` instead of Array.from+map+join. Three intermediate allocations eliminated.

persist path (line 697): `job.prefixAccum.subarray(0, job.prefixBytes)` (no copy) then `.buffer.slice(byteOffset, byteOffset+byteLength)` (one copy into ArrayBuffer for cache). Redundant Uint8Array copy eliminated.
evictBitmaps (lines 134-136): still builds Set from exceptJxlUrls on each call but now uses TIER_SEP-aware prefix check (sepIdx). No structural regression; minor alloc remains (low severity).
invalidate (progressive-cache.ts): bitmaps are now evicted via direct for-of over this.bitmapStore.keys() without spread (lines 163-166 use direct TIER_SEP-based delete loop).
onChunk throttle (line 620): `Date.now()` still called per chunk but the broader onChunk no longer allocates a Uint8Array copy, which was the dominant cost. Date.now() call unchanged.
concatUint8Arrays (line 107): instanceof filter removed — now `chunks.filter((c) => c.byteLength > 0)` only filters zero-length, no instanceof check.
selectTiers (lines 91-95): reverse scan with a for loop replaces filter+last-element pattern. No intermediate filtered array allocated.
Cache key separator changed from '#' to TIER_SEP='\0' (line 26). evictBitmaps uses indexOf(TIER_SEP) (line 148). invalidate uses direct delete per tier (lines 163-166). '#' collision eliminated.
validateManifest (lines 196-204): Number.isFinite + >= 0 check on byteStart, Number.isFinite + > 0 on byteEnd, and byteEnd > byteStart cross-check all added.
Same fix as security-2. byteEnd > byteStart assertField present at lines 208-212.
Same fix as security-2/contracts-3.
validateManifest (lines 139,141,143,180): encoder.name <= 256, libjxlVersion <= 64, flags.length <= 64, perceptual keys <= 32 asserted.
getManifest expiry path (line 66): replaced `void this.inner.set(key, new ArrayBuffer(0))` with `await this.inner.delete(key)`. Sentinel eviction pattern eliminated; proper delete used.
Same fix as contracts-7. The eviction is now awaited via `await this.inner.delete(key)` with no fire-and-forget race.
getManifest catch (lines 70-73): on corrupt entry now calls `await this.inner.delete(key).catch(() => undefined)` to self-heal before returning null. Cache evicts corrupt entries.
selectTiers (line 77): dc tier only pushed when `dcEvent.byteOffset > 0`. Zero byteEnd tier is never emitted.

selectTiers (lines 58-68): early guard `if (events.length === 0 || totalBytes === 0)` returns a full tier with byteEnd=totalBytes (which may be 0 only if totalBytes is 0 — but this is a degenerate case and the zero-dc-tier bug is fixed).

profileJxl (line 173): `bytesPushed = end` set BEFORE `await session.push(...)` so synchronous frame emissions inside push() capture the correct byte offset. Ordering inverted to fix the off-by-chunk issue.
Same fix as logic-4. bytesPushed is set before push, so framesTask reading bytesPushed synchronously during push gets the end value, not the pre-push value.
pushTask catch (lines 181-185): on error, calls `await session.cancel()` before rethrowing. This closes the frames() generator, unblocking framesTask and preventing a hang.
No-manifest fallback (line 685): `const achieved = target` (not job.targetTier). target = nextTier(job.currentTier) is one tier up. Multi-tier jump eliminated.
Same fix as contracts-4.
normaliseCenter (lines 54-56): `const clamp = (v: number) => Math.min(1, Math.max(0, v))` added; output clamped to [0,1].
toSaliency (line 128): `confidence: opts.confidence ?? 0` — always emits confidence (defaults to 0). Schema violation where confidence was omitted eliminated.
evictBitmaps now uses TIER_SEP='\0' and indexOf(TIER_SEP) (line 148) instead of lastIndexOf('#'). jxlUrls with '#' no longer cause wrong urlPart extraction.
scheduler.test.ts: no occurrence of prefixChunks found. Obsolete field removed from test fixtures.

progressive-profile.ts profileJxlFile still uses `opts: ProfileOptions & { writeManifest?: boolean }` inline type. The writeManifest side effect is still undocumented in the exported ProfileOptions type. No fix applied.
No cross-tier ordering check added to validateManifest. ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/logic-9-cross-tier-ordering-invariant.md.
validateManifest still does not validate capture/channels/channelDescriptors. ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/contracts-14-phase8-optional-fields-validation.md.
migrateManifest still throws hard on version > 1 with no migration path. ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/contracts-15-manifest-versioning-strategy.md.
Hand-rolled validation remains; no Zod/valibot schema adopted. ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/security-4-schema-validation-library.md.
No structured error taxonomy added. ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/009-errors-13-error-taxonomy.md.

No default fetch timeout utility added (errors-7 added a manifest-specific timeout; broader pattern for tier/full fetches not formalized). ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/009-errors-14-default-fetch-timeout.md.
No scheduler benchmark added. ADR written at undefined/sections/009/adr_draft/009-performance-13-scheduler-benchmark.md.
No property-based tests added for validateManifest. No fix_log; no test file changes observed. ADR category.
manifestDispatched reset-on-retry not addressed. Pre-existing deferred status from plan.json; no code change observed.
nextTier null-for-full / silent exclusion not addressed. Pre-existing deferred status from plan.json; no code change observed.
